jobs.name: DSim UVM: random test (PASS)
jobs.command: dsim -uvm 1.2 -top tb_top rtl/alu.sv tb/alu_if.sv tb/alu_pkg.sv tb/tb_top.sv +UVM_TESTNAME=alu_random_test

jobs.name: DSim UVM: random test +BUG (fails -> Problems panel)
jobs.command: dsim -uvm 1.2 -top tb_top rtl/alu.sv tb/alu_if.sv tb/alu_pkg.sv tb/tb_top.sv +UVM_TESTNAME=alu_random_test +BUG

jobs.name: DSim UVM: smoke test
jobs.command: dsim -uvm 1.2 -top tb_top rtl/alu.sv tb/alu_if.sv tb/alu_pkg.sv tb/tb_top.sv +UVM_TESTNAME=alu_smoke_test
